case_title: GUILLERMO AMIGO VS. NICHOLAS MENDELL ET AL

DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANT NICHOLAS MENDELL'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS AND ANSWERS TO FORM INTERROGATORIES AND SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF GUILLERMO AMIGO IS ORDERED TO SERVE COMPLETE, VERIFIED RESPONSES TO DEFENDANT'S SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES, SET ONE, FORM INTERROGATORIES-GENERAL AND DEMAND FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS SERVED ON OCTOBER 31, 2014 WITHIN 20 DAYS OF BEING SERVED WITH THE NOTICE OF ENTRY OF THE ORDER ARISING FROM THIS HEARING. THE REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IS DENIED. COUNSEL FOR THE DEFENDANT IS TO PREPARE THE ORDER. JUDGE PRO TEM: PETER VAN ZANDT. CLERK: ROSIE NOGUERA. NOT REPORTED. (302/JPT)

Off Calendar Oct-20-2015 Continued To Mar-29-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Order To Compel Responses To Request For Document Production, Answers To Interrogatories And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Jun-30-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: David Barch of Law Offices of Gregory DeBernard telephone number 925-977-1400 appeared by telephone for Defendant.

No other appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person. The Court adopted the tentative ruling. Defendant NICHOLAS MENDELL's Motion to Compel Responses to Request for Production of Documents and Answers to Form Interrogatories and Special Interrogatories is GRANTED. Plaintiff GUILLERMO AMIGO is ORDERED to serve complete, verified responses to Defendant's Special Interrogatories, Set One, Form Interrogatories-General and Demand for Production of Documents served on October 31, 2014 within 20 days of being served with the Notice of Entry of the Order arising from this hearing. The request for sanctions is DENIED. Counsel for the Defendant is to prepare the order.

Judge Pro Tem: Peter Van Zandt. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported. (302/JPT)
